question: Based on the chart of website visitors over 14 days, which statement about visitors at the beginning versus the end of the period is most accurate?

options.A: The number of visitors was higher during the first few days than during the last few days.
options.B: The number of visitors was higher during the last few days than during the first few days.
options.C: Visitor numbers were roughly the same at the beginning and at the end of the period.
options.D: It is impossible to compare the beginning and end of the period from this chart.

explanation: The x‑axis order has been scrambled: the bars are not shown in true chronological sequence. If you reorder the days from Day 1 to Day 14 and sum the first and last 7 days, you see that the first segment actually has the greater total. Judging only from the apparent left‑to‑right pattern would give the wrong conclusion.
